content_body: Our son got married on Sept. 5, 2015, and we stayed in this lovely cabin for 6 days. It was the perfect location as we enjoyed the river, the great view from the balcony and the BBQ grill while entertaining. Its location was close to downtown Murphy and the wedding venue, McGuire's Millrace Farm. We went zip lining and rafting down the river many, many times. We could not have picked a better cabin with a better location! Thanks for a wonderful experience!
title: Could Not Have Picked A Better Cabin
